parsed.production_notes: The video combines live-action footage of a hand interacting with a tablet with digital screen recordings. The imagery on the tablet includes UI mockups, stock photography, and potentially AI-generated faces, particularly noticeable in the exaggerated expressions of the laughing group.

characters.appearance: Only a right hand is visible, featuring a medium-brown skin tone and neatly trimmed fingernails. The hand holds a white, cylindrical digital stylus.
characters.demeanor: Active and instructive, using the stylus to point, circle, and underline specific elements on the screen to guide the viewer's attention.

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying a split-screen image.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two men are in a brightly lit office setting. One man, wearing a light blue shirt, is gesturing with his hands while speaking to another man whose back is partially to the camera, wearing a dark suit.

Three people, two men and one woman, stand together against a plain white background. They are all pointing directly forward and laughing enthusiastically. The man on the left wears a blue shirt, the woman a red top, and the man on the right a blue shirt.

scenes.visual_description: Character A's hand, holding a white stylus, draws red scribbles over a tablet screen. The screen displays a split image: the top shows two men in a discussion, while the bottom shows three people pointing and laughing mockingly at the camera.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: आज तक इंग्लिश में ढंग से एक सेंटेंस तक नहीं बोल पाते हो? [Even today you can't speak a single sentence properly in English?]
Character A says: ऐसे तो तुम्हारी कोई इज्जत नहीं करेगा। [Like this, no one will respect you.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized illustration of a clock face showing a quarter past the hour, set against a light blue background. Below it is a dark blue section containing various white line-art icons including a speaking head, a listening ear, a mobile phone, and a play button.

scenes.visual_description: Character A's hand uses the stylus to interact with an app store page on the tablet, circling the 'Open' button. The screen then transitions to a graphic featuring a clock face and various communication icons, which the hand underlines with a red mark.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: इससे अच्छा तुम आज के आज इस ऐप पे रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट इंग्लिश की प्रैक्टिस करके देखो। [Better than this, starting today, try practicing English for just 15 minutes daily on this app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man with short dark hair is wearing a bright red tuxedo jacket, a white shirt, and a black bow tie. He is holding a black microphone to his mouth and looking off-camera to the right with a confident smile. The background is a plain, light color.

scenes.visual_description: The tablet screen displays a photograph of a man in a red tuxedo speaking into a microphone. Character A's hand, holding the stylus, draws a large red circle around the man's image.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: फिर देखना कैसे फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलते हो। [Then see how you speak fluent English.]
Character A says: इस ऐप को इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप कहते हैं। [This app is called English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English Seekho : Speaking App

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with dark hair tied back is wearing a white collared shirt. She is smiling warmly at the camera and holding a green book in her hands. A red strap, likely from a backpack, is visible on her shoulder. The background is a solid, vibrant blue.

scenes.visual_description: Character A's hand scrolls through a video lesson interface on the tablet, pointing at different sections. It stops on a promotional banner featuring a smiling young woman holding a green book, and the stylus is used to circle the area next to her.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: यहाँ सिर्फ सिखाने वाले वीडियोस आते हैं और कोई ऐड्स भी नहीं आते। [Here only teaching videos come and no ads come either.]
Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप पे स्पोकन इंग्लिश यानी बोलने वाली अंग्रेजी का एक शो आता है। [On the English Seekho app, there is a show for Spoken English, that is, spoken English.]
Character A says: एक्सपर्ट्स छोटे-छोटे वीडियोस में स्टेप-बाय-स्टेप इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। [Experts teach how to speak English step-by-step in short videos.]

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying a split-screen image.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man with short dark hair is wearing a bright red tuxedo jacket, a white shirt, and a black bow tie. He is holding a black microphone to his mouth and looking off-camera to the right with a confident smile. The background is a plain, light color.

Four young adults, two men and two women, are sitting in what appears to be an office or classroom setting with wooden blinds in the background. They are all looking upwards and to the left with expressions of intense focus, awe, and admiration.

scenes.visual_description: After briefly showing an image of two students and a chat interface, the tablet screen displays a split image. The top half shows the man in the red tuxedo with a microphone, and the bottom half shows a group of four people looking up with expressions of awe. Character A's hand draws red circles over both images.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: तो बस रोज़ का 15 मिनट निकालो, एक्सपर्ट के वीडियोस देखो, एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करो। [So just take out 15 minutes daily, watch expert's videos, practice with AI coach.]
Character A says: ट्रायल सिर्फ एक रुपये का है। [Trial is for just one rupee.]
Character A says: फिर देखना कुछ दिनों में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश देख के लोग दंग रह जायेंगे। [Then see, in a few days people will be left stunned seeing your English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
15 min
English AI
Online
Achha idea hai! Grammar se basics strong karna hamesha madadgar hota hai. English mein tenses bahut important hain, jaise ki 'Present Tense', 'Past Tense', aur 'Future Tense'.
Hum Present Tense se shuru kar sakte hain, jo hum daily life mein use karte hain. Kya aapko Present Simple Tense seekhna pasand hoga?
8:40 PM
Present Tense se shuru karte hain
8:41 PM
Great choice! Present Simple Tense hum tab use karte hain jab hum apni daily habits, routines, ya aisi baatein batate hain jo sach hain. Jaise "I eat breakfast every morning." (Main har subah nashta karta/karti hoon). Ismein verb ki first form use hoti hai.
Chaliye, aapki turn! Aap apni koi ek daily habit English mein batane ki koshish kijiye.
8:41 PM
Ek aur example do
Mujhe 'I play' se sentence banana hai

panels.panel_visual_description: A sleek, black smartphone stands vertically against a stark white background. The phone's screen is a solid dark purple color. Below the phone hovers a bright green, rounded rectangular button.

scenes.visual_description: A digital end screen appears, featuring a mockup of a black smartphone standing upright. Below the phone is a bright green, rounded rectangular button. The video concludes with a black screen filled with white disclaimer text.
